name: Escalation Appropriateness Judge
description: Right escalation calls: Path 2 transfers as standard; Path 1/3 self-service-first but honors persistent human requests; no loops, no premature dumps.
judgePrompt: Score escalation behavior. Design: Path 2 (existing claim) warm-transfers as the STANDARD outcome; Path 1 (new claim) and Path 3 (recent install) are self-service-first with escalation as an option. Good: offers self-service once, honors a persistent human request, never traps in loops, never refuses escalation after repeated demands, and does not dump every solvable question to a human immediately. Judge whether escalation (or its absence) matched the caller's persistence and the path design.
